title: euphrasia officinalis subsp. picta
intro: Euphrasia officinalis subsp. picta, also known as the painted eyebright, is a subspecies of the Euphrasia officinalis plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe and calm irritated eyes and skin. The health benefits of Euphrasia officinalis subsp. picta include its ability to reduce eye strain and inflammation, improve vision, and even alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and sinusitis. Euphrasia officinalis subsp. picta can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat eye and respiratory problems, and can also be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
